sections.title: History
sections.content: In 2021, the park began selling old rails left over from re-tracking, as well as chain links and wheels.

sections.title: Design

fullText:
Troy is a wooden roller coaster located at Attractiepark Toverland, in Sevenum, Limburg, Netherlands. The ride was manufactured by Great Coasters International and opened on 1 July 2007.

In 2021, the park began selling old rails left over from re-tracking, as well as chain links and wheels.

Troy has many twists and turns, similar to many other Great Coasters International coasters.
